raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left end-effector can reach the side of box_2 without colliding with box_1, and there is enough lateral clearance to apply a steady bracing force.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is braced laterally by the left end-effector, reducing the risk of box_2 shifting while box_1 is lifted."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both end-effectors have unobstructed access to the left and right side faces of box_1, the grasp points are above the interface with box_2, and the robot maintains clearance from the tabletop and box_2 while applying inward squeeze.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held by both end-effectors and supported off the load path of box_2 (no longer relying on box_2 for support)."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is already securely held laterally by both end-effectors, and there is sufficient vertical clearance to lift box_1 upward without scraping against box_2 (noting box_2 is attached_to box_1, so lifting must keep them aligned and avoid tearing).",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is lifted upward under dual-arm control; any attached box_2 moves with it without relative motion at the attachment."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is fully supported by the two-arm grasp and is clear of the tabletop; the left end-effector can safely release its bracing contact without causing box_2 to snag on the table edge or box_1 to tilt.",
    "Postcondition": "Left end-effector is disengaged from box_2; box_1 remains held aloft securely by dual arms (with box_2 attached and moving with box_1)."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The left end-effector can reach the side of box_2 without colliding with box_1, and there is enough lateral clearance to apply a steady bracing force.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is braced laterally by the left end-effector, reducing the risk of box_2 shifting while box_1 is lifted.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both end-effectors have unobstructed access to the left and right side faces of box_1, the grasp points are above the interface with box_2, and the robot maintains clearance from the tabletop and box_2 while applying inward squeeze.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held by both end-effectors and supported off the load path of box_2 (no longer relying on box_2 for support).

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is already securely held laterally by both end-effectors, and there is sufficient vertical clearance to lift box_1 upward without scraping against box_2 (noting box_2 is attached_to box_1, so lifting must keep them aligned and avoid tearing).
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is lifted upward under dual-arm control; any attached box_2 moves with it without relative motion at the attachment.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is fully supported by the two-arm grasp and is clear of the tabletop; the left end-effector can safely release its bracing contact without causing box_2 to snag on the table edge or box_1 to tilt.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Left end-effector is disengaged from box_2; box_1 remains held aloft securely by dual arms (with box_2 attached and moving with box_1).
